ValidationRule.description: Restricts users from passing the LOI Signature stage until LOI Approval is at 100%
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT( pro_Bypass_LOI_Approval__c ), pro_LOI_Approval__c < 1, OR( ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Deal_Status__c , 'BAC Approval'), ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Deal_Status__c , 'Documentation'), ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Deal_Status__c , 'Closed - Won') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: LOI Approval must be at 100% to pass this stage
